## SimpleStateSelector type

Selects a part of the store state or getters (AKA "getter" inside [Vuex](https://vuex.vuejs.org/) watchers).

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type SimpleStateSelector<ReturnType, State extends Dictionary, Getters extends Dictionary> = (state: State, getters: Getters) => ReturnType;
```
